title: ptilophyllum pinnatum
intro: Ptilophyllum pinnatum is a species of plant in the family Selaginellaceae, commonly known as spike moss. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ptilophyllum pinnatum include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, making it a potential treatment for skin conditions such as acne and eczema. Ptilophyllum pinnatum is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal preparation methods.
